hero.headline: When your septic *backs up*, we show up
hero.subheadline: Same-day service, fair prices, and we'll teach you how to keep it running smooth.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every septic service you need
services_section.subheading: From pumping to repairs — one call handles it all

services.title: Septic Tank Pumping
services.description: Complete tank cleanout and waste removal. We'll locate your tank, pump it clean, and put everything back exactly as we found it.

services.title: Tank Location & Inspection
services.description: Can't find your septic tank? We'll locate it fast and check the whole system while we're there.

services.title: System Repairs
services.description: When something's not working right, we diagnose the problem and fix it. No guesswork, just solutions.

services.title: Emergency Service
services.description: Septic problems don't wait for business hours. When you need help fast, we're ready to roll.

about.heading: Real septic pros in Rock Hill
about.body: We're the team your neighbors call when their septic acts up. Fair pricing, straight answers, and we'll show you how to keep your system healthy.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Rock Hill says about our work

reviews.name: Brian C.
reviews.text: Fantastic job and gave great advice on maintaining a healthy septic system. Extremely kind to my kids and me. Highly recommend this company.

reviews.name: Harlan O.
reviews.text: Called about a septic problem — less than an hour later they were here. Very professional, found the tank, pumped it out, fair rates for the work.

reviews.name: Lezah A.
reviews.text: Reached out on a Sunday morning, Tyler came out the same day and got my septic tank cleaned out. Excellent customer service.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Rock Hill and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout York County

cta.heading: Ready to get your septic handled?
cta.body: Free quotes, fair prices, and we show up when we say we will. Call or text us right now.
